name: Plank With Arm Reach
instructions:
1. Forearm plank position
2. Extend one arm forward
3. Hold 2 seconds
4. Return and alternate
tips: Keep hips level. Anti-rotation challenge.

name: Side Plank Hip Dip
instructions:
1. Side plank on forearm
2. Dip hip toward floor
3. Raise back to straight line
4. Repeat, then switch sides
tips: Controlled dip, don't touch floor. Feel oblique contraction.

name: Plank Jack
instructions:
1. Start in forearm plank
2. Jump feet apart
3. Jump feet back together
4. Maintain plank position
tips: Core stays tight. Good cardio burst.

name: Bear Plank
instructions:
1. On hands and toes
2. Knees hover 1 inch off ground
3. Hold position
4. Keep back flat
tips: Knees barely off the ground. Intense core activation.

name: Stir the Pot
instructions:
1. Forearm plank on stability ball
2. Move forearms in small circles
3. Clockwise then counterclockwise
4. Keep body still
tips: Stuart McGill's favorite. Small circles, tight core.

name: Weighted Plank
instructions:
1. Standard plank position
2. Partner places plate on upper back
3. Hold position
4. Maintain alignment
tips: Progress from bodyweight plank. Keep breathing.

name: Lying Windmill
instructions:
1. Lie on back, arms out to sides
2. Raise legs vertical
3. Lower legs to one side, keeping shoulders down
4. Return to center, alternate
tips: Controlled movement. Don't let shoulders lift off ground.

name: Reverse Crunch
instructions:
1. Lie on back, knees bent
2. Curl hips off floor bringing knees to chest
3. Squeeze lower abs
4. Lower hips back down
tips: Lift hips, don't just swing knees. Feel lower abs work.

name: L-Sit
instructions:
1. Support on hands or parallettes
2. Lift legs straight out in front
3. Hold L position
4. Press shoulders down
tips: Gymnastic hold. Progress from tuck position.

name: Suitcase Deadlift
instructions:
1. One dumbbell at side like a suitcase
2. Hinge at hips, lower toward floor
3. Keep torso upright, don't lean
4. Stand back up
tips: Anti-lateral flexion deadlift. Stay perfectly vertical.

name: Z Press
instructions:
1. Sit on floor, legs extended
2. Press barbell overhead
3. No back support
4. Lower with control
tips: Brutal core demand. Exposes mobility issues.

name: Snatch Grip Deadlift
instructions:
1. Wide grip on barbell (snatch width)
2. Set up like deadlift but wider hands
3. Pull to lockout
4. Squeeze traps at top
tips: Builds huge upper back. Requires more mobility.

name: Jefferson Curl
instructions:
1. Stand on elevated surface
2. Slowly round spine one vertebra at a time
3. Lower weight past feet
4. Re-stack spine to return
tips: Very slow and controlled. Light weight. Builds spinal mobility.

name: Couch Stretch
instructions:
1. Kneel with back foot against wall
2. Front foot forward in lunge
3. Squeeze glute of back leg
4. Hold, feeling deep hip flexor stretch
tips: Intense stretch. Essential for desk workers.

name: Frog Stretch
instructions:
1. On hands and knees
2. Spread knees wide apart
3. Rock hips back
4. Feel stretch in inner thighs
tips: Go slowly. Incredibly effective for hip mobility.

name: Banded Hip Distraction
instructions:
1. Attach band low, loop around hip
2. Step away to create tension
3. Lunge or squat position
4. Band creates space in joint
tips: Creates joint space. Great for squat mobility.

name: Sleeper Stretch
instructions:
1. Lie on side, arm at 90 degrees
2. Push forearm toward floor gently
3. Feel stretch in back of shoulder
4. Hold, don't force
tips: Critical for shoulder health in overhead athletes.

name: Ankle Mobility Drill
instructions:
1. Foot about 4 inches from wall
2. Drive knee toward wall over toes
3. Keep heel on ground
4. Progressive distance from wall
tips: Essential for squat depth. Test: knee should pass over toes.

name: Prone Shoulder I-Y-T
instructions:
1. Lie face down
2. Arms overhead in I position, lift and hold
3. Arms in Y position, lift and hold
4. Arms in T position, lift and hold
tips: Great for shoulder health and posture. Light or no weight.

name: 200m Sprint
instructions:
1. Sprint half a track
2. Maintain speed through curve
3. Lean into the bend
4. Finish strong through line
tips: Curve running technique. Lean into the turn.

name: 300m Shuttle
instructions:
1. Set cones 25m apart
2. Sprint and touch line 6 times (300m total)
3. Full effort
4. Record time
tips: Soccer-specific fitness test. Under 60s is elite.

name: Yo-Yo Intermittent Recovery Test
instructions:
1. 20m shuttle run with increasing speed
2. Audio beeps set the pace
3. 10 second recovery between shuttles
4. Continue until failure
tips: Gold standard soccer fitness test. Measures repeated sprint ability.

name: Suicide Sprint (Lines)
instructions:
1. Sprint to nearest line and back
2. Sprint to middle line and back
3. Sprint to far line and back
4. Sprint to furthest line and back
tips: Classic conditioning drill. Touch each line.

name: Sled Sprint
instructions:
1. Strap sled to waist
2. Sprint with resistance
3. Drive knees high
4. Maintain sprint mechanics
tips: 10-15% body weight on sled. Builds acceleration power.

name: Agility Ladder High Knees
instructions:
1. Face ladder
2. Run through with high knees
3. One foot per square
4. Pump arms
tips: Quick feet, high knees. Don't look down.

name: Agility Ladder Ali Shuffle
instructions:
1. Straddle ladder
2. Jump feet in-out while moving laterally
3. One foot in, one foot out
4. Muhammad Ali footwork
tips: Float like a butterfly. Light, quick feet.

name: W-Drill
instructions:
1. Set 5 cones in W pattern
2. Sprint forward to first cone
3. Backpedal to second
4. Sprint to third, etc.
tips: Change of direction and acceleration/deceleration.

name: X-Pattern Agility
instructions:
1. 4 cones in square, start at corner
2. Sprint diagonally
3. Shuffle sideways
4. Sprint diagonally back, shuffle to start
tips: Multi-directional movement. Simulates game scenarios.

name: Single Leg Box Jump
instructions:
1. Stand on one foot facing box
2. Jump onto box with single leg
3. Land softly on same foot
4. Step down, repeat
tips: Advanced plyometric. Master bilateral first.

name: Pogo Jump
instructions:
1. Stand tall, feet together
2. Small continuous jumps
3. Stiff ankles and knees
4. Quick ground contacts
tips: Minimal knee bend. Bounce off the balls of feet.

name: Scissor Jump
instructions:
1. Start in split stance
2. Jump and switch legs mid-air
3. Land in opposite split
4. Immediately jump again
tips: Same as lunge jump. Keep torso upright.

name: Medicine Ball Overhead Throw
instructions:
1. Hold ball behind head
2. Step forward and throw overhead
3. Follow through with body
4. Retrieve and repeat
tips: Full body throw. Great for developing throwing power.

name: Penalty Kick Practice
instructions:
1. Place ball on penalty spot
2. Pick your side before starting run
3. Confident approach
4. Strike with conviction
tips: Commit to your decision. Side-foot for accuracy.

name: Free Kick Practice
instructions:
1. Place ball at various distances
2. Aim for corners
3. Practice curving the ball
4. Focus on technique
tips: Strike across the ball for curve. Practice from different angles.

name: Dribble Sprint
instructions:
1. Set cones 30m apart
2. Sprint with ball
3. Touch ball every 2-3 strides
4. Maintain speed with ball
tips: Push ball with laces. Look up, not at ball.

name: Receiving Under Pressure
instructions:
1. Partner passes ball
2. Check shoulder before receiving
3. Take first touch away from pressure
4. Play ball back quickly
tips: Body shape: open to the field. First touch determines everything.

name: Chip Shot
instructions:
1. Approach ball
2. Stab underneath the ball
3. Loft ball over goalkeeper/obstacle
4. Backspin for control
tips: Minimal follow-through. Sharp stabbing motion under ball.

name: Defensive Heading
instructions:
1. Attack the ball at highest point
2. Jump to meet the ball
3. Head ball up and away from goal
4. Get distance and height
tips: Jump and attack the ball. Don't wait for it to come to you.

name: Half Volley
instructions:
1. Ball bouncing toward you
2. Strike just as it hits the ground
3. Keep body over the ball
4. Follow through low
tips: Timing is critical. Strike the ball just after bounce.

name: Turning With Ball
instructions:
1. Receive ball facing away from goal
2. Control and turn in one motion
3. Use inside/outside/sole to turn
4. Accelerate away after turn
tips: Check shoulder before receiving. Quick turns.

name: Foam Roll Lats
instructions:
1. Lie on side, roller under armpit area
2. Arm extended overhead
3. Roll from armpit to mid-ribcage
4. Pause on tender spots
tips: Tight lats affect overhead mobility. Roll slowly.

name: Foam Roll Hip Flexors
instructions:
1. Face down, roller under front of hip
2. One leg on roller, other leg out to side
3. Roll small area of hip flexor
4. Pause on tight spots
tips: Common tight area from sitting. Gentle pressure.

name: Foam Roll Adductors
instructions:
1. Lie face down
2. One leg out to side, roller under inner thigh
3. Roll from knee to groin
4. Control pressure with body weight
tips: Important for soccer players. Prevents groin injuries.

name: Lacrosse Ball Glute Release
instructions:
1. Sit on lacrosse ball
2. Cross one leg over opposite knee
3. Roll around glute area
4. Find and hold on trigger points
tips: Deeper than foam roller. Great for piriformis syndrome.

name: Lacrosse Ball Pec Release
instructions:
1. Place ball between pec and wall
2. Roll around chest area
3. Move arm to access deeper tissue
4. Focus on tight areas near shoulder
tips: Opens up chest. Great for rounded shoulder posture.

name: Yoga Flow
instructions:
1. Sun salutation sequence
2. Flow through poses
3. Hold each 5-10 breaths
4. Focus on breath and movement
tips: Active recovery. Combines stretching, strength, and mindfulness.

name: Box Breathing
instructions:
1. Inhale 4 seconds
2. Hold 4 seconds
3. Exhale 4 seconds
4. Hold empty 4 seconds
tips: Navy SEAL breathing technique. Reduces anxiety and aids recovery.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust Single Leg
instructions:
1. Upper back on bench, one foot on floor
2. Other leg extended or bent
3. Drive hips up with single leg
4. Squeeze glute, lower slowly
tips: Addresses imbalances. Keep hips level.

name: Deficit Reverse Lunge
instructions:
1. Stand on small platform (4 inches)
2. Step back into reverse lunge
3. Greater range of motion from deficit
4. Drive through front heel
tips: Increases ROM for more glute activation. Control the step-back.

name: Pause Bench Press
instructions:
1. Lower bar to chest
2. Pause 2-3 seconds on chest
3. Press up explosively
4. Full lockout
tips: Builds strength off the chest. Use less weight than touch-and-go.

name: Cable Face Pull With Rotation
instructions:
1. Cable at face height with rope
2. Pull toward face
3. At end, externally rotate hands up
4. Form W shape with arms
tips: Essential prehab exercise. Slow and controlled.

name: Spider Curl
instructions:
1. Lie face down on incline bench
2. Arms hanging straight down
3. Curl dumbbells up
4. Squeeze at top, lower slowly
tips: Eliminates all momentum. Pure bicep isolation.

name: JM Press
instructions:
1. Like skull crusher start position
2. Lower bar toward chin/neck area
3. Elbows stay forward
4. Press back up
tips: Hybrid skull crusher/close-grip press. Great tricep builder.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Lunge
instructions:
1. Hold dumbbells at sides
2. Step wide to one side
3. Bend stepping knee, push hips back
4. Push back to center
tips: Keep trailing leg straight. Great for hip mobility.

name: Band Pull-Apart
instructions:
1. Hold band at arm's length
2. Hands shoulder-width
3. Pull band apart, squeezing upper back
4. Return slowly
tips: Light band, high reps. Great warm-up or posture corrector.

name: Dumbbell Squeeze Press
instructions:
1. Hold dumbbells together above chest
2. Squeeze them together throughout
3. Press up and down
4. Maintain inward pressure
tips: Constant chest contraction. Excellent mind-muscle connection.

name: Barbell Reverse Curl
instructions:
1. Hold bar with overhand grip
2. Curl up to shoulders
3. Keep wrists straight
4. Lower slowly
tips: Builds forearm size. Use EZ-bar for wrist comfort.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions:
1. Hold dumbbells at sides
2. Shrug shoulders straight up
3. Hold 1 second at top
4. Lower slowly
tips: More range of motion than barbell. Don't roll shoulders.

name: Seated Overhead Dumbbell Extension
instructions:
1. Sit on bench, hold one dumbbell overhead
2. Lower behind head, bending elbows
3. Press back up
4. Keep upper arms still
tips: Seated version reduces cheating. Full stretch at bottom.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions:
1. Lie face down, pad behind ankles
2. Curl both legs up
3. Squeeze at top
4. Lower with control
tips: Don't let hips lift. Slow eccentric for best results.

name: Glute Kickback
instructions:
1. Attach cable to ankle
2. Hold machine for balance
3. Kick leg back, squeezing glute
4. Lower slowly
tips: Full squeeze at back. Don't arch lower back.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions:
1. Kneel with ankles anchored
2. Slowly lower body forward
3. Control the descent as long as possible
4. Push off floor to return (or pull with hamstrings)
tips: Gold standard for hamstring injury prevention. Soccer essential.

name: Cable Lateral Walk
instructions:
1. Band around ankles or above knees
2. Quarter squat position
3. Step sideways against band
4. Controlled steps, don't let knees cave
tips: Great glute activation warmup. Keep tension in band.

name: Goblet Reverse Lunge
instructions:
1. Hold dumbbell at chest
2. Step back into reverse lunge
3. Lower until front thigh parallel
4. Drive through front heel
tips: Goblet position helps balance. Easier on knees than forward lunge.

name: Dumbbell Skull Crusher
instructions:
1. Lie on bench, dumbbells overhead
2. Lower to sides of forehead
3. Extend arms to press up
4. Keep upper arms vertical
tips: Dumbbell version allows more natural movement. Control the weight.

name: Pallof Press Hold
instructions:
1. Stand sideways to cable
2. Press handle out and hold
3. Resist rotation
4. Hold for time, switch sides
tips: Isometric anti-rotation. Don't let the cable pull you.

name: Ankle Band Lateral Walk
instructions:
1. Band around ankles
2. Athletic squat stance
3. Step sideways maintaining tension
4. Don't let knees cave in
tips: Pre-game activation. Keep toes forward.

name: Passing Pattern (Triangle)
instructions:
1. 3 players form triangle
2. Quick one-two touch passing
3. Move after passing
4. Rotate positions
tips: Communication and movement. Play to teammate's preferred foot.

name: Tackling Drill
instructions:
1. Approach ball carrier
2. Stay on feet, jockey
3. Time the tackle
4. Win the ball cleanly
tips: Stay on your feet. Timing beats aggression.

name: Goalkeeper Distribution
instructions:
1. Goal kicks from ground
2. Throw distribution (overarm, underarm)
3. Drop kicks
4. Vary distance and accuracy
tips: Quick distribution creates counter-attack opportunities.

name: Speed Ladder Two In Two Out
instructions:
1. Move laterally through ladder
2. Two feet in each square
3. Two feet outside
4. Quick rhythm
tips: Develop rhythm first, then add speed. Stay on toes.

name: Lateral Hop
instructions:
1. Stand on one foot
2. Hop side to side over line
3. Quick ground contact
4. Stay on one leg
tips: Develops ankle stability and lateral power. Quick contacts.

name: Rotational Med Ball Slam
instructions:
1. Hold ball at hip
2. Rotate and slam diagonally
3. Full body rotation
4. Alternate sides
tips: Rotational power. Great for soccer kicking power.

name: Supinated Dumbbell Curl
instructions:
1. Start with palms facing thighs
2. Curl up while rotating to supinated position
3. Full supination at top
4. Lower while rotating back
tips: Supination engages bicep fully. Controlled rotation.

name: Cross-Body Hammer Curl
instructions:
1. Hold dumbbell with neutral grip
2. Curl across body toward opposite shoulder
3. Squeeze at top
4. Lower and alternate
tips: Targets the brachialis. Builds arm thickness.

name: Dumbbell Floor Press
instructions:
1. Lie on floor, dumbbells at chest
2. Press up to lockout
3. Lower until triceps touch floor
4. Brief pause, press again
tips: Reduces shoulder stress. Great home gym exercise.
